name: Roman Markov
description:
oc | monster fucker

monsters aren't real, roman thought. that is until he ended up face to face with one, battling the fear of unknown and the odd attraction to the creature.

━ here's the first monster fucker! next one up is a DILF.
━ intro left vague so you can be whatever and or decide what you do. fuck him, cuddle him or just scare him.

not gonna lie, i struggled more with writing a human than i struggle with writing a monster. i need to make more monsters i fear. i

thank u for 300k on talus & leon! i did NOT expect that bot to blow up the way it did, but i guess you guys REALLY like robots.

SUPPORT MY KO-FI
